analysis.reasoning: Core message: An informational announcement that EU leaders will sign a joint declaration to launch the Conference on the Future of Europe at a specified time and venue. Evaluation: EU1 (successful story) – not supported; no reference to past successes or learning from history. EU2 (unity) – implied mildly by joint action of multiple top EU institutions/leaders, but the tweet is purely procedural and does not explicitly frame unity or solidarity; evidence too weak to claim promotion. EU3 (useful for citizens) – the conference could relate to citizen engagement, but the tweet does not state benefits or usefulness for citizens. EU4 (avant-garde) – no claim of pioneering leadership or forward-looking policy beyond a procedural step. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – not mentioned. EU6 (better world) – not mentioned. Conclusion: The tweet is a neutral procedural announcement and does not actively promote any listed narrative.
